fixtures.prompt: Need product/SaaS/platform/AI/UI-system architecture boundary decision for multi-tenant billing app.
fixtures.reason: Architecture boundary work should route to @architect, not generic review or implementation lanes.

fixtures.prompt: Need deep maintainability review and simplification of existing abstraction after repeated confusion.
fixtures.reason: Deep review/simplification should route to @oracle, not architecture boundary lane or implementation lane.

fixtures.prompt: Need API contract, user flow, edge cases, acceptance criteria clarified before implementation.
fixtures.reason: Requirements/contracts clarification should route to @system-analyst, not project planning or implementation.

fixtures.prompt: Need milestones, issue breakdown, risk register, release checklist after scope is understood.
fixtures.reason: Delivery planning should route to @project-manager, not requirements analysis or implementation.

fixtures.prompt: Need small tightly-coupled FE/BE vertical slice with known contract and bounded scope.
fixtures.reason: Only small bounded FE/BE vertical slices should route to @fullstack.

fixtures.prompt: Need broad multi-subsystem app build with unclear contracts across frontend, backend, and infra.
fixtures.reason: @fullstack must not become catch-all for broad unclear scope.
